languages.text: "Себериан многие циклы заперт в этой ловушке. Его нужно вытащить".

traits.locale_text: [драфт] Говорим, что она всецело предана Себериану и должна понимать, что быть в ловушке — вот главная для него опасность

languages.text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."
languages.original_text: "Себериан многие циклы заперт в этой ловушке. Его нужно вытащить".

traits.locale_text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."
"Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."
"Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."

languages.text: “塞贝里安已经被困在这个循环里很久了，我们得把他弄出去。”
languages.original_text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安已经被困在这个循环里很久了，我们得把他弄出去。”

languages.text: « Seberian est prisonnier de ce piège depuis de nombreux cycles. Nous devons le sortir de là. »
languages.original_text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."

traits.locale_text: « Seberian est prisonnier de ce piège depuis de nombreux cycles. Nous devons le sortir de là. »

languages.text: "Seberian kim bilir kaç döngüdür bu tuzağın içinde sıkışıp kalmış. Onu çıkarmamız gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian kim bilir kaç döngüdür bu tuzağın içinde sıkışıp kalmış. Onu çıkarmamız gerekiyor."

languages.text: «Seberian lleva muchos ciclos atrapado en esta trampa. Debemos sacarle de aquí».
languages.original_text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."

traits.locale_text: «Seberian lleva muchos ciclos atrapado en esta trampa. Debemos sacarle de aquí».

languages.text: "Seberian ist seit vielen Zyklen in dieser Falle gefangen. Wir müssen ihn befreien."
languages.original_text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian ist seit vielen Zyklen in dieser Falle gefangen. Wir müssen ihn befreien."

languages.text: 「シベリアは多くのサイクルにわたってこの罠に捕らわれている。彼を救い出す必要がある。」
languages.original_text: "Seberian has been stuck in this trap for many cycles. We must get him out."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアは多くのサイクルにわたってこの罠に捕らわれている。彼を救い出す必要がある。」
